zh.lifeSummary: wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars於1100年之前與Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars于1100年之前与Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Ness
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of unknown origin; borne by a character in Táin Bó Cuailgne (the Cattle Raid of Cooley), the mother of Conchobhar.

variants.name: Neassa
meanings: Traditional name of unknown origin; borne by a character in Táin Bó Cuailgne (the Cattle Raid of Cooley), the mother of Conchobhar.

variants.name: Neasa
meanings: Traditional name of unknown origin; borne by a character in Táin Bó Cuailgne (the Cattle Raid of Cooley), the mother of Conchobhar.

variants.name: Vanessa
meanings: Name invented by Jonathan Swift ( 1667–1745 ) for his friend Esther Vanhomrigh . It seems to have been derived from the first syllable of her (Dutch) surname, with the addition of the suffix -essa (perhaps influenced by the first syllable of her given name). The name became fairly popular in the 20th century, being borne for example by the actress Vanessa Redgrave ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars married Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars before 1100, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars a épousé Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars avant 1100, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars hat vor 1100 in Europa Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars lei sposato Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars prima del 1100, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leucharsは1100年以前にヨーロッパでNess FitzWilliam of Leucharsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars(은)는 1100년 이전 우럽에서 Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars вышла замуж за человека по имени Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars перед 1100 г. в местности Европа. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars se casó con Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars antes de 1100, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
